quiz.title: Grade-10 Physics: Midterm Review Quiz 2
quiz.subtitle: Comprehensive Review — Kinematics through Simple Machines
quiz.subject: Physics

questions.question: A particle accelerating from rest moves along a straight line path under a constant acceleration of $4.60\text{ m/s}^2$. Calculate the exact time interval required for the particle to traverse a distance of $58.0\text{ m}$.
An orbital monitoring system records a satellite tracking interval spanning exactly $2.50\text{ weeks}$. Convert this total duration of time into standard seconds ($\text{s}$).

An athlete holds a heavy barbell stationary at arm's length above their head for several seconds during a weightlifting routine. State whether the work done by the athlete on the barbell during this specific static holding phase is positive, negative, or zero.
questions.explanation: The barbell is stationary — there is no displacement. $W = F \times d = F \times 0 = 0$. Zero work is done.

questions.question: A $52.0\text{ kg}$ extreme sports athlete stands at the edge of a high platform ready to dive into an airspace safety net below. If the platform is positioned exactly $28.5\text{ m}$ vertically above the target net line, what is the gravitational potential energy of the athlete relative to that net? ($g = 9.80\text{ m/s}^2$)

A $1,600\text{ kg}$ sedan traveling at $24.0\text{ m/s}$ slams on its brakes, skidding to a complete halt on a level roadway. If the average friction force opposing the motion during the skid is $7,800\text{ N}$, calculate the total stopping distance using energy principles.

A $0.160\text{ kg}$ hockey puck glides across smooth ice at $11.0\text{ m/s}$. A player strikes the puck, delivering a forward impulse that increases its velocity to $36.0\text{ m/s}$. Determine the total impulse imparted to the puck.

A heavy cargo elevator mechanism pulls a loaded platform up a vertical shaft at a constant velocity of $1.35\text{ m/s}$. The electric drive motor exerts a continuous upward force of $1.80 \times 10^4\text{ N}$. What power output is being delivered by the drive system?
A mechanical hoist system with an operational efficiency rating of $74.0\%$ is supplied with $8,500\text{ J}$ of total energy. How much useful mechanical work output can this system perform?

A $0.0450\text{ kg}$ ballistic dart is fired horizontally into a stationary $2.40\text{ kg}$ block of clay on a frictionless horizontal bench. The dart embeds itself in the clay, and the combined mass slides forward at $3.50\text{ m/s}$. Determine the initial velocity of the dart before the collision.

An industrial worker uses a fixed inclined plane ramp to slide heavy supply barrels into a storage facility. The ramp has a total length of $6.20\text{ m}$ along its slope and reaches a vertical platform height of $1.55\text{ m}$. Calculate the ideal mechanical advantage (IMA) of this simple machine setup.

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You're well-prepared across all units!
scoreMessages.70: Good work! Review the topics where you made errors.
scoreMessages.50: Keep studying! Focus on work-energy theorem, impulse-momentum, and power calculations.
scoreMessages.0: Significant review needed. Revisit kinematics, energy, momentum, and simple machines.
